name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* Type invariant: each process is in one of three states *)
TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Transition: a process can move from idle to trying *)
Try(i) == /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

(* Transition: a process can move from trying to critical if no one else is critical *)
Enter(i) == /\ state[i] = "trying"
           /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => state[j] # "critical"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

(* Transition: a process can leave critical to idle *)
Leave(i) == /\ state[i] = "critical"
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

(* Next-state relation: any process can make a transition *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (Try(i) \/ Enter(i) \/ Leave(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_state

(* Mutual exclusion property: at most one process in critical section *)
MutualExclusion == \A i, j \in 1..N : i # j => state[i] # "critical" \/ state[j] # "critical"

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in 1..10

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages

TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \in [1..N -> {"idle", "prepared", "aborted"}]
    /\ coordinator \in {"idle", "preparing", "committing", "aborted"}
    /\ messages \in [1..N -> {"", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]

Init ==
    /\ participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ coordinator = "idle"
    /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> ""]

PreparePhase ==
    /\ coordinator = "idle"
    /\ coordinator' = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages'[i] = "Prepare"
    /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "Prepare" /\ participants[i] = "idle"
    /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> "prepared"]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages'[i] = "VoteYes"
    /\ coordinator' = "preparing"

VoteNo ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \E i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "Prepare" /\ participants[i] = "idle"
    /\ participants' = [i \in 1..N |-> IF messages[i] = "Prepare" THEN "aborted" ELSE participants[i]]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages'[i] = "VoteNo"
    /\ coordinator' = "aborted"

CommitPhase ==
    /\ coordinator = "preparing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "VoteYes" /\ participants[i] = "prepared"
    /\ coordinator' = "committing"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages'[i] = "Commit"
    /\ UNCHANGED participants

AbortPhase ==
    /\ coordinator = "aborted"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages[i] = "VoteNo" /\ participants[i] = "aborted"
    /\ coordinator' = "aborted"
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: messages'[i] = "Abort"
    /\ UNCHANGED participants

Next ==
    \/ PreparePhase
    \/ VoteYes
    \/ VoteNo
    \/ CommitPhase
    \/ AbortPhase

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
TypeOK == forks \in {0,1}^N /\ state \in {"thinking","hungry","eating"}^N

Init == forks = <<0: i \in 0..N-1>> /\ state = <<"thinking": i \in 0..N-1>>

Left(i) == (i - 1) % N
Right(i) == (i + 1) % N

Hungry(i) == state[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[i] = 0 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
Eating(i) == state[i] = "eating" /\ forks[i] = 1 /\ forks[Left(i)] = 1

TakeForks(i) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 1, ![Left(i)] = 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, forks>>

PutForks(i) == 
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Left(i)] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, forks>>

Next == \E i \in 0..N-1:
  (Hungry(i) /\ TakeForks(i)) \/ (Eating(i) /\ PutForks(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ flag[i] = FALSE
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
              /\ UNCHANGED num
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = Max(SeqValues(num)) + 1]
              /\ UNCHANGED flag
          \/ /\ flag[i] = TRUE
              /\ num[i] > 0
              /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => num[j] = 0 \/ num[j] > num[i]
              /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
              /\ UNCHANGED num

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

TypeOK == /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
          /\ head \in 0..K
          /\ tail \in 0..K
          /\ size \in 0..K

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0
        /\ size = 0

Producer == /\ size < K
           /\ q' = Append(q, 1)
           /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size + 1
           /\ head' = head

Consumer == /\ size > 0
           /\ q' = Tail(q)
           /\ head' = (head + 1) % (K + 1)
           /\ size' = size - 1
           /\ tail' = tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
          /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
          /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = "Follower"

RequestVote == /\ state = "Candidate"
              /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
              /\ votedFor' = currentTerm
              /\ state' = "Leader"

Next == \/ RequestVote
        \/ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

TypeOK == readers \in 0..N /\ writer_active \in {TRUE, FALSE}

Init == readers = 0 /\ writer_active = FALSE

ReadEnter == /\ readers < N
              /\ readers' = readers + 1
              /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadExit == /\ readers > 0
             /\ readers' = readers - 1
             /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteEnter == /\ readers = 0
               /\ writer_active' = TRUE
               /\ readers' = readers

WriteExit == /\ writer_active = TRUE
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE
             /\ readers' = readers

Next == \E action \in {ReadEnter, ReadExit, WriteEnter, WriteExit} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
VARIABLES chanState, procState


(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of channels (p,q) pairs *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ Proc \subseteq 1..N
    /\ Chan \subseteq Proc \times Proc
    /\ Chan = { (p,q) \in Proc \times Proc : p # q }  \* all directed pairs

(* State of each process: "idle" or "recorded" *)
procState == [p \in Proc |-> {"idle", "recorded"}]

(* Channel state: sequence of messages in transit *)
chanState == [c \in Chan |-> Seq("msg")]

(* Global state *)
vars == <<procState, chanState>>

Init == 
    /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> "idle"]
    /\ chanState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

(* Process p records its state and sends markers on all outgoing channels *)
record(p) ==
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "recorded"]
    /\ \A q \in Proc : q # p => 
        chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![(p,q)] = Append(chanState[(p,q)], "marker")]

(* Process p receives a marker on channel (q,p) *)
receiveMarker(q,p) ==
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "recorded"]
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![(q,p)] = Tail(chanState[(q,p)])]

(* Process p receives a normal message on channel (q,p) *)
receiveMsg(q,p) ==
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p] = "recorded"]
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![(q,p)] = Tail(chanState[(q,p)])]

Next ==
    \E p \in Proc :
        \E q \in Proc : q # p :
            \E m \in {"marker", "msg"} :
                /\ chanState[(q,p)] # <<>> 
                /\ IF m = "marker" THEN receiveMarker(q,p)

    \/ \E p \in Proc : procState[p] = "idle" /\ record(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, state

(* State of each node: "idle" or "sending" *)
TypeOK == token \in 1..N /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "sending"}]

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next ==
  \/ (* Node i sends a message if it holds the token *)
     \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ token = i
       /\ state[i] = "idle"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "sending"]
       /\ UNCHANGED token
  \/ (* Node i finishes sending and passes the token to the next node *)
     \E i \in 1..N:
       /\ token = i
       /\ state[i] = "sending"
       /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
       /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
  \/ (* No node holds the token: token stays the same *)
     /\ ~(token \in 1..N)
     /\ UNCHANGED state
     /\ UNCHANGED token

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, state>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

KeysVal == 1..Keys
ValuesVal == 1..Values

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in KeysVal |-> 0]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in KeysVal /\ \E v \in ValuesVal : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
        \/ UNCHANGED store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, ballot, value

TypeOK == /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot: Nat, value: Nat]]
          /\ chosen \in Nat

Init == /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ proposers = [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> 0]]
        /\ chosen = 0

Prepare(i, j) == /\ proposers[j].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot + 1
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Promise(i, j) == /\ acceptors[i].ballot' = proposers[j].ballot
                 /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accept(i, j) == /\ acceptors[i].value' = proposers[j].value
                /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

Accepted(i, j) == /\ proposers[j].value' = acceptors[i].value
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, chosen>>

Choose(j) == /\ chosen' = proposers[j].value
             /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..M :
          \/ Prepare(i, j)
          \/ Promise(i, j)
          \/ Accept(i, j)
          \/ Accepted(i, j)
          \/ Choose(j)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES seq, ack, retransmits, state

TypeOK == /\ seq \in 1..N
          /\ ack \in 1..N
          /\ retransmits \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state \in {"idle", "sending", "waiting_ack", "done", "failed"}

Init == /\ seq = 1
        /\ ack = 0
        /\ retransmits = 0
        /\ state = "idle"

SendMsg == /\ state = "idle"
           /\ state' = "sending"

Transmit == /\ state = "sending"
           /\ state' = "waiting_ack"

AckReceived == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
              /\ ack' = seq
              /\ retransmits' = 0
              /\ state' = "idle"

Retransmit == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
              /\ retransmits < MAX_RETRIES
              /\ retransmits' = retransmits + 1
              /\ state' = "sending"

GiveUp == /\ state = "waiting_ack"
          /\ retransmits = MAX_RETRIES
          /\ state' = "failed"

Next == \E action \in {SendMsg, Transmit, AckReceived, Retransmit, GiveUp} : action

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<seq, ack, retransmits, state>>
